current_implemented_build: V47.1 TrustMap Restoration and Readability Patch
next_planned_build_sequence: V48-V51 Executive Authority and Authenticity Trust Layer
architecture: Runtime Governance, Operational Admissibility, Interactive Enterprise TrustMap, Manual Evidence Intake, Business Exposure Modeling, Role-Tailored Proof Pack, Dangerous Action Simulation, Executive Authority Layer, Executive Commitment Record, and planned Authenticity Trust Layer
core_thesis: AI is controlled before it acts, or it is not controlled at all.
core_question: Should this action be operationally admissible right now?
v47_1_patch_type: Corrective regression patch, not forward feature scope
v47_1_reason: The TrustMap was over-simplified during V45-V47, losing meaningful visual objects, relationship lines, clickable link explanations, and readability. V47.1 restores those qualities before V48.
v47_1_quality_rule: The TrustMap must not degrade into unreadable bubbles or initials. It must show meaningful business/security objects, visible relationships, clickable connection explanations, readable labels, and accessible text contrast.

v47_1_restored_modules: meaningful TrustMap object tiles instead of initials
visual icons for identity, cloud, vendors, AI agents, data, endpoints, policy, evidence, and decision records
TrustMap relationship records in Proof Pack
horizontal scrolling for the map on narrow screens instead of crushing the map
preserved_capabilities: V46 evidence-backed confidence and score authority
V47 Executive Commitment Record and deadline pressure
v51_core_principle: In the AI era, trust is not assumed. Trust is verified.
v51_positioning_line: When everything can be faked, CyberShield helps prove what can be trusted.
ethical_boundary: Use psychology, accountability pressure, and trust design to improve clarity, trust perception, executive decision quality, customer protection, and evidence-backed action. Do not manipulate users, hide uncertainty, exaggerate capability, imply live enforcement where none exists, imply live notification or ticketing where none exists, imply live takedown automation where none exists, obscure the prototype boundary, create artificial fear, or pressure users without evidence.
prototype_boundary: The current public build is a lightweight static prototype with local/export-oriented behavior only. It is not connected to live SIEM, EDR, IAM, Microsoft 365, GRC, CRM, cloud telemetry, Google Sheets sync, ticketing, notification systems, marketplace systems, ad platforms, takedown systems, or production agent enforcement systems.
commercial_entry_wedge: CyberShield Readiness Review or Operational Trust Assessment led by Maximum Justice Cybersecurity and Dr. Max Justice, vCISO, Security SME, Cybersecurity SME, U.S. veteran, and creator of The CHN vCISO GPT powered by Cyber Shield.
